subject: Re: FW: Holiday Gift Ideas from The Core Club
body:
send me a list of all the benefits of the founding
member   , including when we get our money returned

--- Lesley Groff <lesley@nysgllc.com> wrote:

>  
> 
>   _____

> From: Giulia Pistorio
> [mailto:gpistorio@thecoreclub.com]

> Subject: Holiday Gift Ideas from The Core Club
> 
> 
> 
> Dear Mr. Epstein,
> 
>  
> 
> Hello and Happy Holidays from The Core Club! The
> gift giving season is just
> around the corner, and as many of us are thinking
> what to get our loved
> ones, I wanted to let you know that I can help if
> you are still looking for
> the perfect gift! A gift certificate to the Spa at
> The Club is a wonderful
> way to treat someone special in your life. Whether
> it is one of our
> signature facials, or one of our luxurious massage
> therapies, this is a
> great way to spread the holiday joy.
> 
>  
> 
> Just as a reminder, as a Founding Member you do have
> a monthly credit that
> does not roll over, so this would also be the
> perfect opportunity to make
> sure that your credit does not go unused. If you
> would like I can also
> arrange for a messenger to deliver the certificate
> to the receiver and
> charge it to your TCC account. A painless quick way
> to wrap up those who are
> left on your list or deserve a little extra
> something!
> 
>  
> 
> Please call me at directly at (646)764-5369, at the
> Club at (212) 486-6600
> or email me at Giulia.Pistorio@thecoreclub.com  and
> I can make all the
> arrangements today!!
> 
>  
> 
> All the best,
> 
> Giulia
>

>

body_html:
send me a list of all the benefits of the founding
member , including when we get our money returned

--- Lesley Groff lesley@nysgllc.com wrote:

From: Giulia Pistorio
[mailto:gpistorio@thecoreclub.com]
Sent: Thursday, December 22, 2005 10:30 AM
To: LESLEY@NYSGLLC.COM
Subject: Holiday Gift Ideas from The Core Club

Dear Mr. Epstein,

Hello and Happy Holidays from The Core Club! The
gift giving season is just
around the corner, and as many of us are thinking
what to get our loved
ones, I wanted to let you know that I can help if
you are still looking for
the perfect gift! A gift certificate to the Spa at
The Club is a wonderful
way to treat someone special in your life. Whether
it is one of our
signature facials, or one of our luxurious massage
therapies, this is a
great way to spread the holiday joy.

Just as a reminder, as a Founding Member you do have
a monthly credit that
does not roll over, so this would also be the
perfect opportunity to make
sure that your credit does not go unused. If you
would like I can also
arrange for a messenger to deliver the certificate
to the receiver and
charge it to your TCC account. A painless quick way
to wrap up those who are
left on your list or deserve a little extra
something!

Please call me at directly at (646)764-5369, at the
Club at (212) 486-6600
or email me at Giulia.Pistorio@thecoreclub.com and
I can make all the
arrangements today!!

All the best,

Giulia
